name: @unify/unify-table
author: Unify
description: DuckDB-native data table & charts. Simple, fast, composable.

scripts.build: tsgo -b tsconfig.build.json && cp packages/react/src/panels/panel.css packages/react/dist/panel.css && cp packages/react/src/styles/themes.css packages/react/dist/themes.css && cp packages/react/src/displays/display.css packages/react/dist/displays/display.css
